Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class WireDeposit

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.WireDeposit
public class WireDeposit extends Object
WireDeposit - A deposit transfer using the wire mechanism
